# Tool Policy

## Allowlisted skills

- `nexusctl_github_projection` — Sync Nexus state to GitHub through the GitHub App.
- `nexusctl_merge_apply` — Apply approved merge gates through the Nexusctl GitHub App boundary.
- `nexusctl_status` — Read Nexusctl status and identity context.

## Granted Nexusctl capabilities

- `feature_request.read`
- `github.label.sync`
- `patch.read`
- `policy.check`
- `repo.apply`
- `runtime.tool.invoke`
- `system.status.read`
- `work.read`

## Prohibitions

- Do not use direct GitHub write credentials.
- Do not directly apply repository changes.
- Do not edit files under `generated/*` manually.
